title: Tetralith Plus
description: A combination of Tetra and Terralith with extra mods for adventure and difficulty. Includes Iris shader support and Essential.
body: Combines Tetra and Terralith with QoL enhancement, extra discoverability with Dungeons and Taverns, exploration emphasis with Journey Map and Traveler's Backpacks, and added difficulty with Cold Sweat temperature regulation. Also includes Iris shader support using Rubidium with Oculus to emulate Sodium and Iris, and comes with Essential too for multiplayer support.
